title: Alien Evo: Female Aliens Resource Pack
description: For making the aliens female of the mod Alien evo
body:
# **_~~Join the discord for more info: https://discord.gg/fwHEae8frQ~~_**


### You want to have female aliens on Alien evo? Now you can!
### 
With this resource pack your aliens will become their female counterparts.

Also, their appearances will try to be the most "canon" to OS series, what do i mean? A Tetramand will have muscles, Arburian pelarotas will not be skinny, all the designs try to be as female they can without the aliens losing what they are.

The uniforms change from Ben´s ones, i make them in my style,

**_Addons confirmed to be compatible in the discord server!_**

If u want me to make ur addon, contact me on Discord, but not all addons will be made, im just one person. (If at any point u want ur addon out, contact me still and ill erase it from the resource pack, also i wont do any addon the creator/s didnt let me do)
